commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a managed npm install-mode fast path that validates and skips reinstalling an already-installed plugin when its package version satisfies the requested version, with docs, changelog, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main resolves npm metadata, then rejects an existing managed npm package directory before checking whether the installed version satisfies the request. I did not run a live Docker wizard repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Contributor and maintainer action is needed for the stale cached-resolution record path plus real behavior proof; ClawSweeper repair should not be queued while the external PR proof gate is still unmet.

target.title: fix(plugins/install): skip reinstall when installed plugin version satisfies requested
target.author: hclsys
